name: colt-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for COLT (Conference on Learning Theory) submissions: venue fit for theorem-first papers, CMT submission checks, 12-page PMLR-format discipline, proof appendices, rebuttal strategy, proof-centric reproducibility, related-work positioning across theory communities, numerical illustration norms, workflow, and PMLR camera-ready. Grounded in the COLT 2026 CFP and PMLR proceedings pages checked on 2026-07-08.
